pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 6 sets SCENARIOS_DIR="$BC_ROOT/Scenarios" where BC_ROOT=/opt/bridgecommand
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 92 removes /home/ga/Quarantine; export_result.sh line 7 defines QUARANTINE_DIR="/home/ga/Quarantine"
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 7 sets MODELS_DIR="$BC_ROOT/Models" where BC_ROOT=/opt/bridgecommand
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 15 iterates with 'for model in "Coaster" "Ferry" "Tug" "Yacht"'

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic test task for a Bridge Command scenario library maintenance system. All metadata is accurate: the task operates on directories at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios, /opt/bridgecommand/Models, and /home/ga/Quarantine. The test environment defines exactly four valid ship models: Coaster, Ferry, Tug, and Yacht. Four synthetic test scenarios are seeded: Legacy_Fatal_Error (ownship model missing), Legacy_Missing_Tug (invalid tug type requiring substitution), Legacy_Unknown_Ship (invalid generic type requiring fallback), and Legacy_Valid_Archive (all valid models). All directories, model names, and scenario identifiers in the metadata match the setup script definitions exactly.
